summary: Full backend + frontend E2E testing for SovereignAI landing page. All 6 pytest backend tests pass (briefing success, missing key 401, wrong key 401, missing/empty field 422, rate limit 429 after 5 requests). Frontend loads with dark obsidian bg (rgb(5,7,10)), WebGL Resonant Field canvas present, hero + sigil render, ScrambleText resolves to correct final headings on scroll ('Department-Native Intelligence Engine', 'The Sovereign Flow', 'Industries We Fortify', 'Active Deployments', 'The Sovereign Manifesto', 'Request Sovereign Briefing'). Briefing form E2E submits successfully -> 'TRANSMISSION SUCCESSFUL · BRIEFING QUEUED'. Manifesto page renders, headings scramble-resolve, Return to Substrate navigates back to /. Nav smooth-scroll works. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiter is in-memory (_rate_registry dict) — will not persist across worker restarts and doesn't scale beyond one process; acceptable for MVP, flag for future Redis-based limiter.

SOVEREIGN_KEY is shipped to the browser via REACT_APP_SOVEREIGN_KEY — anyone viewing the site source can extract and abuse the endpoint. Consider moving briefing submission behind a lightweight signed challenge or Cloudflare Turnstile rather than a static shared secret embedded in the SPA bundle.
server.py uses os.environ['SOVEREIGN_KEY'] on every request — a missing key crashes at request time instead of at startup; assert env vars at boot.
Landing page briefing endpoint response returns doc id; consider not echoing origin_ip via any future GET endpoint (currently no read path so fine).
seed_data_creation: Created MongoDB briefings docs with TEST_ prefixed name/org for identification (not cleaned up — no delete endpoint exists).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rate limiter is per-IP in-memory 5 req / 60s. Backend tests consume the quota (~7 requests within test_rate_limiting), so wait 60s before running frontend form E2E. Backend URL: https://neural-vault-18.preview.emergentagent.com. Sovereign key in both backend/.env SOVEREIGN_KEY and frontend/.env REACT_APP_SOVEREIGN_KEY.
